mechanism: Export ban cascades amplify the original food price shock by 30-60% through prisoner's dilemma dynamics, intensifying the depreciation-inflation-policy error loop in food-importing EM economies. 33 countries restricted in 2007-08; the amplification is endogenous to the initial price shock.
regime_dependence: Activates when USD strength >10% coincides with wheat >$8/bu; conditional probability >60% historically (n=3)
